$description: Developer tooling palette — cool blue on slate. Intentionally distinct from warm Citron consumer UI so dev surfaces, debug menus, and internal tools are instantly recognizable.

devtools.$description: Primitives for dev-only chrome. Do not use in customer-facing product surfaces.

dominant.$description: Dominant blue — headers, key metrics, active nav in dev shell

support.$description: Support blue — secondary emphasis, icons, dividers tint, hover text

accent.$description: Emerald accent — success in dev context, pass states, OK badges (not product brand citron)

primary.$description: Primary action — same as dominant; use semantic interactive.primary in components

primaryHover.$description: Primary hover — lighter blue lift on dark ground

surface.$description: Raised panels, cards, drawers — one step above background

textPrimary.$description: Primary text on dev dark UI

focus.$description: Focus ring on dev controls — matches support for visibility
